docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAM, STERLING J. AS TO DEFENDANT CSAA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CSAA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAM, STERLING J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CSAA PARTIES STIPULATE TO AMEND CLAIM TO DELETE JAMES POULIOT AS A DEFENDANT AND TO ADD CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INSURANCE BUREAU, AND SUCH PARTY WAIVES ANY DEFECT IN SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
